data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario regarding rate limiting on auth endpoints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to rate limiting on auth endpoints. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces that confirm the behavior of the system under the specified conditions. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the rate limiting aspect, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the expected outcome.
gaps: No evidence of rate limiting behavior on auth endpoints being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for rate limiting
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define specific tests that simulate rate limiting on auth endpoints and capture the outcomes.
